title: GateVerdict
description: Structured return from doc-validator agent when it runs a gate script.

pass.description: True iff the gate script exited 0.

gate.description: Name of the gate that ran (e.g. 'gate-requirements').

errors.description: Verbatim error lines from the gate script. Empty when pass==true.

stdout_tail.description: Last ~40 lines of gate-script stdout for diagnostic context. May be empty.
